title: Manage the harvest of crops
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage the harvest of crops demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine crop quality

pcs.text: Assess potential crop yield from data collected in the field
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess potential crop yield from data collected in the field?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess potential crop yield from data collected in the field.

pcs.text: Test and assess crop quality in the field according to workplace and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test and assess crop quality in the field according to workplace and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test and assess crop quality in the field according to workplace and industry standards.

pcs.text: Estimate the pre-harvest value of crop from tests and assessments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate the pre-harvest value of crop from tests and assessments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate the pre-harvest value of crop from tests and assessments.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine crop quality

elements.title: Determine crop readiness

pcs.text: Refer pre-harvest samples to laboratory or marketing agent to determine potential crop quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refer pre-harvest samples to laboratory or marketing agent to determine potential crop quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refer pre-harvest samples to laboratory or marketing agent to determine potential crop quality.

pcs.text: Monitor weather conditions to estimate rate of ripening
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor weather conditions to estimate rate of ripening?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor weather conditions to estimate rate of ripening.

pcs.text: Monitor crop maturity and estimate optimal crop harvest commencement period
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor crop maturity and estimate optimal crop harvest commencement period?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor crop maturity and estimate optimal crop harvest commencement period.

pcs.text: Assess incidence of pests and determine pre-harvest treatment requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess incidence of pests and determine pre-harvest treatment requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess incidence of pests and determine pre-harvest treatment requirements.

pcs.text: Select pre-harvest treatments to ensure crop meets market requirements and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select pre-harvest treatments to ensure crop meets market requirements and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select pre-harvest treatments to ensure crop meets market requirements and industry standards.

pcs.text: Check adherence to work health and safety and environmental requirements throughout the application of pre-harvest treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check adherence to work health and safety and environmental requirements throughout the application of pre-harvest treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check adherence to work health and safety and environmental requirements throughout the application of pre-harvest treatments.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine crop readiness

elements.title: Assess the need for insurance

pcs.text: Confirm commitments to insure the crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm commitments to insure the crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm commitments to insure the crop.

pcs.text: Estimate crop value
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate crop value?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate crop value.

pcs.text: Insure crop according to estimates and commitments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Insure crop according to estimates and commitments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Insure crop according to estimates and commitments.

pcs.text: Analyse, assess and implement strategies to manage financial risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse, assess and implement strategies to manage financial risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse, assess and implement strategies to manage financial risk.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Assess the need for insurance

elements.title: Plan harvest strategy

pcs.text: Estimate harvest commencement date and timing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate harvest commencement date and timing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate harvest commencement date and timing.

pcs.text: Determine equipment, technologies, and labour resources required for harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine equipment, technologies, and labour resources required for harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine equipment, technologies, and labour resources required for harvest.

pcs.text: Reconcile required equipment and labour against available resources and determine contract requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reconcile required equipment and labour against available resources and determine contract requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reconcile required equipment and labour against available resources and determine contract requirements.

pcs.text: Plan and organise equipment preparation prior to harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan and organise equipment preparation prior to harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and organise equipment preparation prior to harvest.

pcs.text: Plan application of required pre-harvest pest control treatments according to crop assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan application of required pre-harvest pest control treatments according to crop assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan application of required pre-harvest pest control treatments according to crop assessment.

pcs.text: Determine and arrange required licenses, permits and notifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and arrange required licenses, permits and notifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and arrange required licenses, permits and notifications.

pcs.text: Determine and document order of harvest in harvest plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and document order of harvest in harvest plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and document order of harvest in harvest plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Plan harvest strategy

elements.title: Plan for work health and safety hazard management

pcs.text: Communicate workplace health and safety procedures to harvesting workforce
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate workplace health and safety procedures to harvesting workforce?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate workplace health and safety procedures to harvesting workforce.

pcs.text: Implement controls to reduce work health and safety hazard and risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement controls to reduce work health and safety hazard and risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement controls to reduce work health and safety hazard and risks.

pcs.text: Monitor, identify and assess health and safety hazards and risks for each stage of harvesting process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor, identify and assess health and safety hazards and risks for each stage of harvesting process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor, identify and assess health and safety hazards and risks for each stage of harvesting process.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Plan for work health and safety hazard management

elements.title: Plan for fire prevention and control

pcs.text: Evaluate the property and identify fire hazards and risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate the property and identify fire hazards and risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate the property and identify fire hazards and risks.

pcs.text: Develop a fire prevention and control strategy to manage fire risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a fire prevention and control strategy to manage fire risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a fire prevention and control strategy to manage fire risk.

pcs.text: Monitor implementation of fire prevention and control strategy and amend according to prevailing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor implementation of fire prevention and control strategy and amend according to prevailing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor implementation of fire prevention and control strategy and amend according to prevailing conditions.

pcs.text: Prepare fire breaks specified in fire prevention and control strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare fire breaks specified in fire prevention and control strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare fire breaks specified in fire prevention and control strategy.

pcs.text: Check firefighting equipment complies with fire authority requirements and fire prevention and control strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check firefighting equipment complies with fire authority requirements and fire prevention and control strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check firefighting equipment complies with fire authority requirements and fire prevention and control strategy.

pcs.text: Implement community fire control practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement community fire control practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement community fire control practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Plan for fire prevention and control

elements.title: Decide on storage and delivery requirements

pcs.text: Allocate crop storage facilities, and plan and arrange delivery of crop according to harvesting plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allocate crop storage facilities, and plan and arrange delivery of crop according to harvesting plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allocate crop storage facilities, and plan and arrange delivery of crop according to harvesting plan.

pcs.text: Check temporary silos, storage bins and other containers are located for efficient harvesting and transport operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check temporary silos, storage bins and other containers are located for efficient harvesting and transport operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check temporary silos, storage bins and other containers are located for efficient harvesting and transport operations.

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety hazards and assess risk from silo operation and implement controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety hazards and assess risk from silo operation and implement controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards and assess risk from silo operation and implement controls.

pcs.text: Plan storage for flexible marketing and distribution initiatives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan storage for flexible marketing and distribution initiatives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan storage for flexible marketing and distribution initiatives.

pcs.text: Review planned crop transport resources against actual and amend workforce/contractor needs accordingly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review planned crop transport resources against actual and amend workforce/contractor needs accordingly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review planned crop transport resources against actual and amend workforce/contractor needs accordingly.

pcs.text: Identify strategies and resources to dry crops according to harvest plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify strategies and resources to dry crops according to harvest plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify strategies and resources to dry crops according to harvest plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E7: Decide on storage and delivery requirements

elements.title: Manage harvest operations

pcs.text: Monitor performance of harvest plan and implement contingencies to address inconsistencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor performance of harvest plan and implement contingencies to address inconsistencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor performance of harvest plan and implement contingencies to address inconsistencies.

pcs.text: Monitor adherence to health, safety and environmental procedures and implement remedial action for breaches
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor adherence to health, safety and environmental procedures and implement remedial action for breaches?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor adherence to health, safety and environmental procedures and implement remedial action for breaches.

pcs.text: Monitor harvest operations to ensure efficient and timely completion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor harvest operations to ensure efficient and timely completion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor harvest operations to ensure efficient and timely completion.

pcs.text: Monitor crop quality during crop harvest and segregate and store into marketing grades according to harvesting plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor crop quality during crop harvest and segregate and store into marketing grades according to harvesting plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor crop quality during crop harvest and segregate and store into marketing grades according to harvesting plan.

pcs.text: Implement enterprise biosecurity policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement enterprise biosecurity policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement enterprise biosecurity policies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E8: Manage harvest operations

elements.title: Record production level and review cropping strategies

pcs.text: Maintain records of harvest according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of harvest according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of harvest according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor and evaluate crop yields against forecast production levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and evaluate crop yields against forecast production levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and evaluate crop yields against forecast production levels.

pcs.text: Review harvest plan and production outcomes and recommend changes to production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review harvest plan and production outcomes and recommend changes to production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review harvest plan and production outcomes and recommend changes to production plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E9: Record production level and review cropping strategies
